text.tspan: Per capita: COVID-19 tests vs. Confirmed deaths, Jun 30, 2020
Both measures are shown per million people of the country's population.
Total confirmed deaths due to COVID-19 per million people
Source: Official data collated by Our World in Data; Johns Hopkins University CSSE
Note: Comparisons of testing data across countries are affected by differences in the way the data are reported. Details can be found at our
